summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open PRs. No merge_candidate is safe because the artifact does not provide a complete merge preflight with resolved review-bot findings and passed Codex /review. No closure actions are allowed by the job.

actions.reason: Tiny useful PR, but failed proof/checks and missing complete review-bot/Codex merge preflight block merge. Maintainer decision or refreshed repair/preflight is needed.
Broad cross-surface config/session/auth-provider feature with compatibility risk. Even with passing checks, finalization needs maintainer product/API judgment and complete merge preflight.
Useful narrow UI fix, but active author-followup status plus uneditable branch and missing resolved review/Codex preflight require maintainer direction before merge or replacement.
Likely promising iOS migration, but compatibility-sensitive project/signing changes need human review and complete merge preflight before merge.
Narrow bug fix, but failed proof/checks, waiting-on-author status, and unresolved behavioral edge-case review comments block merge and need maintainer or author follow-up.

needs_human: #67432: failed checks/proof and missing Codex /review merge preflight.
#51762: broad compatibility-sensitive config/session/auth-provider feature requires maintainer product/API judgment.
#51868: waiting-on-author status plus maintainer_can_modify=false requires maintainer decision on waiting versus replacement.
#92477: compatibility-sensitive iOS project migration lacks review and Codex /review preflight despite passing checks.
#45315: failed proof/checks and unresolved session-state review concerns need maintainer or author follow-up.
